requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and CE Marking for Denmark PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及丹麦光伏逆变器CE标志
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及丹麥光伏逆變器CE標誌

summary.en: For Denmark solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. DS (Danish Standards, ds.dk) is the national standards body, Forsyningstilsynet oversees the energy sector, Sikkerhedsstyrelsen (sik.dk) handles product safety market surveillance, and Energinet controls the practical grid-connection interface. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory for PV inverters placed on the EU/Denmark market. Project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Danish-language installation and safety instructions are commonly required for equipment installed in Denmark.
summary.zh: 对于丹麦太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。丹麦标准局（DS，ds.dk）是国家标准机构，供应监管局监管能源行业，安全技术局（sik.dk）负责产品安全市场监督，能源网控制实际并网接口。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU，在欧盟/丹麦市场销售的光伏逆变器须取得CE标志。项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。在丹麦安装的设备通常需要提供丹麦语安装和安全说明书。
summary.zht: 對於丹麥太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。丹麥標準局（DS，ds.dk）是國家標準機構，供應監管局監管能源行業，安全技術局（sik.dk）負責產品安全市場監督，能源網控制實際併網介面。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU，在歐盟/丹麥市場銷售的光伏逆變器須取得CE標誌。項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。在丹麥安裝的設備通常需要提供丹麥語安裝和安全說明書。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVD 2014/35/EU — mandatory CE marking for EU/Denmark market access
DS (Danish Standards) adoption of EN/IEC safety standards
Energinet and Forsyningstilsynet project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Denmark projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Denmark project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and satisfy LVD 2014/35/EU CE marking requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为丹麦项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而丹麦项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件并满足低电压指令2014/35/EU CE标志要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為丹麥項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而丹麥項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件並滿足低電壓指令2014/35/EU CE標誌要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Denmark LVD/IEC safety expectations. Exporters must: (1) provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family; (2) issue an EU Declaration of Conformity under LVD 2014/35/EU and CE mark the product; (3) confirm that labels and manuals match the Denmark configuration including 230/400 V settings; (4) document protection coordination and earthing; and (5) provide Danish-language installation and safety instructions. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Denmark can require updated safety documentation and a revised EU DoC.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足丹麦低电压指令/IEC安全要求。出口商须：(1) 提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告；(2) 依据低电压指令2014/35/EU出具欧盟符合性声明并为产品加贴CE标志；(3) 确认标签和手册匹配丹麦配置，包括230/400 V设置；(4) 记录保护配合和接地；(5) 提供丹麦语安装和安全说明书。针对丹麦对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件及修订欧盟符合性声明。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足丹麥低電壓指令/IEC安全要求。出口商須：(1) 提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告；(2) 依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU出具歐盟符合性聲明並為產品加貼CE標誌；(3) 確認標籤和手冊匹配丹麥配置，包括230/400 V設置；(4) 記錄保護配合和接地；(5) 提供丹麥語安裝和安全說明書。針對丹麥對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件及修訂歐盟符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU required for EU/Denmark market access; IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence is the standard route to presumption of conformity; Danish-language instructions required for Denmark installations
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Denmark

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Denmark PV projects. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, align labels and manuals to Denmark's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, issue an EU Declaration of Conformity, and provide Danish-language installation and safety instructions. Confirm current DS, Energinet, Forsyningstilsynet, Sikkerhedsstyrelsen, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 丹麦光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。低电压指令2014/35/EU下的CE标志为强制要求。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，使标签和手册匹配丹麦230/400 V、50 Hz配置，出具欧盟符合性声明，并提供丹麦语安装和安全说明书。出货前请确认现行DS、能源网、供应监管局、安全技术局及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 丹麥光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。低電壓指令2014/35/EU下的CE標誌為強制要求。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，使標籤和手冊匹配丹麥230/400 V、50 Hz配置，出具歐盟符合性聲明，並提供丹麥語安裝和安全說明書。出貨前請確認現行DS、能源網、供應監管局、安全技術局及項目業主安全要求。
